page_content:
HEBR269 Special Topics in Study Abroad II (1-6 Credits)

Special topics course taken as part of an approved study abroad program.

Repeatable to: 15 credits if content differs.

HEBR298 Special Topics in Jewish Studies (3 Credits)

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

HEBR298B Introduction to the Hebrew Bible/Old Testament (3 Credits) Origins of the Hebrew Bible (Old Testament), with attention to literary formations, archaeology, and social-political settings. Explorations of major questions, including who wrote the Bible, and when; relationships of the biblical tradition to the mythology and religious structures of ancient Israel's near eastern neighbors; and dynamics of politics, religious leadership, and law.

Cross-listed with: JWST262, ENGL262.

Credit Only Granted for. JWST262, HEBR298B, or ENGL262.
